---
name: Content Improvement
about: Suggest improvements to the structure, explanations, or flow of a chapter
title: '[IMPROVEMENT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Which Chapter or Document?**
e.g. Volume 1, Chapter 1 (V1-C01)

**What needs improvement?**
A clear and concise description of what could be explained better.

**Proposed Solution**
How would you rewrite or restructure this section?

**Additional context**
Add any other context or references about the feature request here.
